channel.title: GitHub SystemVerilog Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of SystemVerilog in GitHub

item.title: openhwgroup/cv-hpdcache
item.description: RTL sources of the High-Performance L1 Dcache (HPDcache) for OpenHW CV cores

item.title: pulp-platform/riscv-dbg
item.description: RISC-V Debug Support for our PULP RISC-V Cores

item.title: lowRISC/ibex
item.description: Ibex is a small 32 bit RISC-V CPU core, previously known as zero-riscy.

item.title: chipsalliance/sv-tests
item.description: Test suite designed to check compliance with the SystemVerilog standard.

item.title: bespoke-silicon-group/basejump_stl
item.description: BaseJump STL: A Standard Template Library for SystemVerilog

item.title: pulp-platform/axi
item.description: AXI SystemVerilog synthesizable IP modules and verification infrastructure for high-performance on-chip communication
